problem: What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue?
mechanism: Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type
hypothesis: The key to What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue? is Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type — specifically Stem cell differentiation — which would help 19,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
